summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a rare 3/18/67 Winterland blues‑heavy show with standout Me and My Uncle and It Hurts Me Too.
review: The recording is praised as clear, organic and high‑quality – a true soundboard (sbd) source that lets the early‑'67 blues/roots vibe shine through. Listeners highlight the rarity of this complete Winterland set and single out Me and My Uncle and It Hurts Me Too as standout moments, while Jerry’s guitar work receives special kudos.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are strongly positive (average 4.6 stars) and consistently commend both the performance and the recording quality; thus a high rating is warranted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as clear, organic and ‘high‑quality’, noting it works well for blues/roots listeners with no reported dropouts or mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is regarded as a solid, blues‑rock heavy performance typical of early ’67, flowing naturally despite the scarcity of documented details.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his bluesy lead and interplay (‘Jerry and Pig’).
